Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a Python dictionary with keys as specified

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each key we need to provide a dict mapping activities to support 1 0 and confidence of the declarative rule

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Could interpret that each activity maps to a dict with support and confidence both 1 0

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: For simplicity we can map each activity to a dict with support 1 0 and confidence 1 0

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to decide which activities belong to each rule

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For init the initial activity or set of activities that start the process could be IG as init

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For existence we can include all activities that definitely exist in the process IG DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP FL

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: For absence let us include only UT

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For exactly one likely AG occurs once FL occurs once and DD exactly once

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Remaining keys are more complex relationships

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Responded existence maybe LT is responded by UT

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Coexistence activities that co occur for example PC and LT also UT and AG

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Response maybe LT is responded by UT

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Precedence for example DD precedes TFC PC precedes LT UT precedes AG

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Succession LT succeeded by UT AG succeeded by MP MP succeeded by FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Altresponse maybe after PC there can be LT or UT as response

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Altprecedence maybe DD can precede CE instead of TFC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Altsuccession maybe UT can be succeeded by MP or FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Chainresponse maybe LT responded by UT which then leads to AG

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Chainprecedence IG precedes DD which precedes TFC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Chainsuccession DD TFC PC LT UT AG

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Noncoexistence for example UT and MP cannot co occur

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Nonsuccession for example FL does not succeed MP

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Nonchainsuccession maybe IG does not directly lead to FL without intermediate steps

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now ensure all keys are present

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We have all
